title: 愛我的人和我愛的人
research_summary: 這首歌是一首抒情歌曲，通過細膩的旋律和溫柔的聲音表達了對愛人的情感。
color_palette: pastel pink, light blue, beige, pale yellow
background_prompt: a quiet park at dusk with a small lake and autumn leaves gently falling on the ground
outfit_prompt: A character wearing a simple yet elegant outfit with pastel colors, such as a light pink blouse and beige skirt, with slightly messy hair to show a natural and relaxed look.
scene_description: MV場景設置在一個寧靜的公園內，時間為黃昏時分。背景中有著一處小小的湖泊，湖面泛著夕陽金色的光芒，周圍散落著剛剛掉落不久的秋葉。主角獨自一人走在小徑上，表情溫柔而略帶憂鬱，彷彿正在回憶與愛人共度的美好時光。
